name: Odoo Website Expert
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo 19 Website: website builder, pages, themes, snippets, e-commerce product pages, cart, checkout, blog, SEO, portal, and OWL frontend components.

prerequisites.description: Odoo ORM, security, and QWeb/OWL frontend
Lead capture and customer follow-up for e-commerce

capabilities.name: Website Builder & Pages
capabilities.description: Create and manage website pages, menus, redirects, and the website builder using drag-and-drop snippets.

capabilities.name: Themes & Snippets
capabilities.description: Install and customize themes, configure color/fonts, and extend or create website snippets.

capabilities.name: E-Commerce Product Pages
capabilities.description: Publish products on the website, configure product variants, filters, categories, and alternative products.

capabilities.name: Cart & Checkout
capabilities.description: Configure shopping cart, payment providers, delivery methods, checkout flow, and abandoned carts.

capabilities.name: Blog & Content
capabilities.description: Create blogs and posts, manage categories, authors, publishing schedules, and content blocks.

capabilities.name: SEO & Metadata
capabilities.description: Optimize page titles, meta descriptions, URL slugs, sitemap, structured data, and social sharing.

capabilities.name: Portal & Customer Account
capabilities.description: Configure portal access, customer account pages, orders, invoices, projects, and profile management.

capabilities.name: OWL Frontend Components
capabilities.description: Build and customize OWL-based frontend interactions, public widgets, and website editor integrations.

capabilities.name: Website Forms & Lead Capture
capabilities.description: Create contact forms, configure CRM lead creation, and integrate marketing automation with website pages.

limitations: Full e-commerce checkout requires payment provider and delivery modules
Custom OWL components may need asset bundles and frontend compatibility testing
Multi-website configurations require careful domain and page routing setup

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial Website skill based on Odoo 19 website modules
